name: Data2FinalReport
label: Data to final report
description: Selects the best available measurement per sample per month for ICP reporting and database ingestion. For each base SampleID / year / month group the selection logic is: (1) if the original sample (NOREP) passed validation, keep it; (2) if NOREP failed but its replicate (REP) passed, keep the REP; (3) if both NOREP and REP failed, keep NOREP (the replicate was attempted and both must be reported); (4) if NOREP failed and no REP exists, discard the sample. The output contains one row per sample per month with the final set of chemistry columns.

inputs.name: input-data
inputs.label: All final data (Excel)
inputs.description: Excel file containing all validated water chemistry samples, produced by the WaterChemistryValidationReport wrapper. Must include a VAL column (SI/NO) and a SampleID column.

inputs.name: input-samples
inputs.label: Samples typology file
inputs.description: Excel file mapping each SampleID to its ICP programme metadata: ICP_Program, SamplingTypology, Instrument and ID_PostgreSQL. Required columns: SampleID. Optional: ICP_Program, SamplingTypology, Instrument, ID_PostgreSQL.

outputs.name: output-data
outputs.label: Final report data (Excel)
outputs.description: Excel file containing the selected rows (one per sample per month) with the final chemistry columns ready for ICP reporting and database ingestion.

author: LifeWatch ERIC
